name: atlas-bootstrap-checklist
html:
Get Atlas running
  1. ○ 1. Add a Server Provider + Add Server Provider
  2. ○ 2. Provision a Server Open Servers
  3. ○ 3. Add a Virtual Machine Image + Add Image
  4. ○ 4. Provision a Virtual Machine Open Virtual Machines
Or run bench --site <site> execute atlas.bootstrap.run to seed all four from a single command.
